name: Chicken Salad with Honey Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 ounces) water chestnuts, drained and chopped
1/4 head lettuce, torn into bite size pieces (about 3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Honey Dressing. Toss the chicken, grapes, onions, bell pepper, and water chestnuts together in a bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate about 2 hours or until chilled.
3. Toss the chilled mixture with orange sections and lettuce.
4. Spoon onto salad greens if desired.
5. Sprinkle with almonds.
6 servings.
